retry_reason: The put is unconditional and always succeeds; retrying would cause a double-put leading to use-after-free.
contract_summary: Release wrapper that decrements the reference count of the shost (struct Scsi_Host) owned by the beiscsi_hba. Typically used as a kobject release callback. The caller must guarantee that this function is called exactly once per corresponding get operation. After this call, the shost pointer must not be dereferenced. No return value to check.
